examples: He was to go to Basle that day and spend the night at a good hotel which his master named.
I know the Hotel in Basle, and if you show my card they will give you good accommodations.
In Basle she was roused by Sebastian, for there they were to spend the night.
Far from encouraging the use of subordinated debt, the Basle standards actually discriminate against it.
"I was relaxed and much more disciplined than I was in Basle for example, " he said.
